actions.pageDescription: Tracked tasks, follow-ups, and commitments across circles.

admin.placeholderSearchUsers: Search users by email or name...

agents.credentialsDesc: Create credentials to connect external AI clients (like Claude or Cursor) to your workspace via the Model Context Protocol (MCP).
agents.noAgents: No agents registered in this workspace yet.
agents.overridesDesc: Override the default model used for each agent based on your cost and quality preferences.
agents.pageDesc: Manage AI autonomous agents, access controls, traces, and spending.
agents.registryDesc: Manage all enabled agents in this workspace. View their recent activity, cost tier, and status.
agents.spendBudgetDesc: Set an overall monthly spending limit for AI model usage across all agents in this workspace.
agents.spendLimitsDesc: Set restrictive spend limits per run and max runs per day for individual agents to prevent runaway costs.
agents.traceClickLeft: Click an agent run on the left to view its full execution trace.
agents.traceTitleUnselected: Select an agent run for trace details
agents.inboxDesc: Agents will pause and ask for your input here when they encounter ambiguity or reach a policy threshold.
agents.inboxNoAgents: No agents are currently waiting for your input.
agents.replyPlaceholder: Type your response or instruction to the agent...
agents.behaviorDesc: Provide specific instructions on how this agent should behave in this workspace. These instructions take precedence over the workspace defaults. Supports Markdown.
agents.behaviorPlaceholder: You are an expert. Always be polite...
agents.notAssigned: This agent is not assigned to any circles.
agents.governancePolicyDesc: Define plain-text boundaries, instructions, and thresholds for this agent. These rules are prepended to the agent's system prompt at runtime.
agents.governancePolicyPlaceholder: e.g., Always ask a human before committing any financial transaction over $50.

audit.decisionTrailDesc: Every action taken in this workspace, by humans and agents.
audit.movedDesc: Agent traces and cost analytics have moved to the dedicated Agent Governance center.
audit.pageDescription: Decision trail, agent traces, and model usage analytics.
audit.placeholderPurgeReason: Sensitive upload, duplicate import, legal request...

auth.setNewPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.setupAccountSubtitle: Choose a secure password to activate your account.
auth.welcomeSubtitle: Your organization's operating system. Log in to access your workspace.
auth.ssoDescription: Enter your work email to continue to your organization's identity provider.

circles.whatIsCircleDescGraph: Circles are autonomous teams with a clear purpose and domain. Start by creating your first circle below.
circles.whatIsCircleDescList: Circles are autonomous teams with a clear purpose and domain. Start by creating your first circle.

cycles.noActiveCycles: No cycles active or planned yet.
cycles.pageDescription: Contribution cycles, member updates, and peer allocations.

governance.approvalPoliciesDesc: Configure how decisions are made for proposals and spend requests.
governance.noConstitution: No constitution yet. Approve proposals to build a policy corpus, then synthesize.
governance.noGovernanceScore: No governance score calculated yet. Click "Recalculate Score" above.
governance.noPolicies: No accepted policies yet. Submit and approve proposals to build the corpus.
governance.pageDescription: Organizational metrics, constitution, and approval policies.

meetings.noInsightsDescription: No insights extracted yet. You can run the AI extraction to find decisions, tensions, action items, and proposals in the transcript.

proposals.pageDescription: Governance proposals for policy changes, new processes, and decisions.
proposals.whatIsProposalDesc: Proposals are how decisions get made. Draft a proposal, open it with the circle, then resolve it with an outcome.

settings.confirmDisconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect this integration?

settings.descMyIntegrations: Connect your personal accounts to give the agent access to your calendar and context.
settings.descOutboundWebhooks: Receive HTTP POST notifications when events occur in your workspace.
settings.descPasteText: Paste raw transcripts, notes, or ad-hoc content directly.

settings.descWorkspaceTags: These tags help Corgtex route proposals to the right advisors.

settings.stepAddActionSchemaDesc: Scroll down to Actions and click Create new action. Click Import from URL and paste:
settings.stepConfigureOauthDesc: Click the gear icon next to Authentication, select OAuth, and paste:
settings.stepFinalizeCallbackDesc: After saving, ChatGPT will generate a Callback URL at the bottom of the Action screen. Note it down—you must update this App integration later if you want strict security, though it defaults to allowing any ChatGPT OAuth flow.

tensions.pageDescription: Issues, gaps, and opportunities sensed across the workspace.
tensions.placeholderResolvedVia: What changed, or why is this resolved?
tensions.whatIsTensionDesc: A tension is any gap between what is and what could be. It's the most important signal in a self-managed organization. File a tension whenever you sense an opportunity for improvement.

demo.unavailable: Demo environment is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
demo.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to demo environment.
demo.prompt: Want to see how it works?
demo.readOnlyBanner: This demo is read-only. You can inspect the workspace freely, but modifications are disabled.

tour.welcomeDescription: You're about to explore how Johnson & Johnson - a $89B company with 138,000 employees - could run on self-management. This demo is populated with real public J&J data.
tour.newspaperDescription: Every morning, this is what you see. A living newspaper of your organization - featured knowledge, recent meetings, active tensions, and to-dos.
tour.memoryDescription: Every piece of knowledge - from board meetings to R&D reports - is automatically processed by AI into a searchable encyclopedia.
tour.structureDescription: Instead of departments and managers, the organization runs on circles - self-governing teams with clear purposes and distributed authority.
tour.decisionsDescription: Proposals turn tensions into action through consent-based governance. No politics, no management committees - just reasoned objections.
tour.askDescription: The AI assistant knows everything in the Brain. Ask it about any topic, draft proposals, or get context for decisions.
tour.exploreDescription: Tour complete! You now have full access to explore Johnson & Johnson's governance through Corgtex. The workspace is read-only, but feel free to click around.

deliberation.resolvePlaceholder: What changed, or why is this resolved?
